rows.label: qev060105_MSG0001
rows.name:
Yahoo! You must be the Earthling delivering
the package to Shiraton-kun, ne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_MSG0002
rows.name:
I've been waiting for you, yo! Yes sir,
I was developing a new weapon, sa?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_MSG0003
rows.name:
And I accidentally created a
super-lethal poison chemical bomb, ne?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_MSG0004
rows.name:
I absolutely don't need something like this,
but I couldn't just throw it away anywhere
either, so I was really in a bind, ne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_MSG0005
rows.name:
It's truly a huge help that Shiraton-kun
and the others are collecting these
kinds of things now, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_SEL0011
rows.name: Say that if it's a powerful weapon, he should just sell it.

rows.label: qev060105_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask for more details about Shiraton's work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_MSG0006
rows.name:
Come to think of it, a BLADE
named Roselle said the exact
same thing earlier, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_MSG0007
rows.name:
She said, "If you'd like, why not let
me handle that product for you"... sa![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_MSG0008
rows.name:
But ne! Ma-non technology is
completely clean, yo. I say no
thank you to such dangerous things![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'll be extra careful not to accidentally make
anything like this again in the future, ne! So
please make sure to properly erase this thing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_MSG0010
rows.name:
My, my, Earthlings are incredibly
curious about the Zaruboggan, ne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_MSG0011
rows.name:
That Roselle person was asking me all
kinds of questions earlier, too, ne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_MSG0012
rows.name:
But, but, I said no thank you to
that! It's better to ask them
directly about those things, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_MSG0013
rows.name:
Anyway, please ask Shiraton-kun
to make sure this super-lethal
bomb is completely erased, ne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060105_MSG0014
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—Here you go! I'm counting on you, yo![ST:wait ]
